content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative no-training self-improvement workflow as a foundational base layer that can be augmented by the multi-perspective inconsistency detection at the core of recent LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-refinement system that outperforms either approach alone. This hybrid system leverages Self-Refine's flexibility to work without external supervision or training data, while resolving its key limitation of getting stuck in local self-feedback loops by introducing the diverse perspective-checking from LLM self-reflection mechanisms.
